summary: Iteration 144 - Blog SEO Posts and Payment History fixes verified COMPLETE. All tests passed: 1) Blog API returns 12 posts including 4 new SEO blog posts. 2) New categories (Business Tips, Monetization) working in filters. 3) Payment History page displays all data correctly (plan names, dates, amounts, order IDs, status badges). 4) Invoice button visible for PAID transactions.

issues: GA4 blog_view event fires multiple times on page load (performance/analytics concern, not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: Blog API at /api/blog/posts returns 12 posts correctly from MongoDB blog_posts collection
4 new SEO blog posts seeded with proper metadata (metaTitle, metaDescription, tags)
New categories: Business Tips (1 post), Monetization (1 post), Design Tools (2 posts), Content Creation (2 posts)
Payment History field mapping working: order_id, plan_name, createdAt, status all displayed correctly
Amount conversion: amounts stored in paise, frontend correctly converts >= 100000 paise to rupees
Invoice button visible only for PAID transactions as expected

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Blog page shows 12 posts, categories filter works, Payment History displays all data correctly

seed_data_creation: 4 new blog posts seeded in MongoDB blog_posts collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog and Payment History features working correctly. Blog has 12 posts total with categories: Content Creation(2), Design Tools(2), Content Strategy(2), YouTube Tips(1), Creative Tools(1), Business Tips(1), Monetization(1), Instagram Tips(1), Social Media(1). Payment History shows 44 total transactions with 1 PAID and proper pagination.

blog_search.note: Search filters posts by title and excerpt

blog_page.individual_post: PASSED - Post detail page loads correctly

payment_history_page.login: PASSED - Redirected to dashboard after login
payment_history_page.payment_list: PASSED - 10 payments shown with plan names
payment_history_page.invoice_button: PASSED - 1 invoice button for PAID transaction
payment_history_page.status_badges: PASSED - PAID and PENDING badges displayed
